# smscollectr

`smscollectr` is an R package designed for the collection, parsing, and
export of meteorological observations transmitted via SMS. It is built
for operational use within ANAM-BF (Agence Nationale de la Météorologie
du Burkina Faso), where field observers send daily measurements as
structured text messages to a central Google Sheet.

> **Scope notice**
>
> This package is purpose-built for a specific operational context at
> ANAM-BF: fixed SMS formats, a CLIDATA-compatible output schema, and a
> Google Sheets-based collection pipeline. It is **not a general-purpose
> SMS parsing library**. That said, the core functions are deliberately
> modular and can serve as a starting point for adaptation to other
> networks, SMS formats, or database targets with minimal effort.

# How it works

![Workflow](reference/figures/workflow3.png)

Workflow

Two SMS formats are supported and automatically detected:

- **Format Gauge** — rain gauge observations

  ``` R
  200001S, 03-06-2026, 125
  ```

- **Format Agro** — agrometeorological station observations

  ``` R
  STATION-NAME
  03-06-2026
  Tn=305
  Tx=438
  ...
  ```

[`parse_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/parse_sms.md)
returns a **named list of two tibbles**, one for each SMS format, making
it straightforward to export each dataset separately for CLIDATA.

## Processing workflow

1.  Field observers send structured SMS messages to a shared phone
    number.

2.  Messages are automatically forwarded to a Google Sheet.

3.  [`read_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/read_sms.md):

    - downloads the sheet,
    - validates SMS messages,
    - repairs malformed gauge messages using
      [`fix_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/fix_sms.md),
    - parses all valid observations.

4.  The function returns:

    - `$gauge`
    - `$agro`
    - `$bad`
    - `$raw`

5.  `write_csv()` exports CLIDATA-compatible CSV files.

6.  [`clean_sheet()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/clean_sheet.md)
    clears the Google Sheet after a successful import.

# Installation

``` r

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("oousmane/smscollectr",
         auth_token = "ghp_xxxxxxxxxxxx")
```

# Initial setup (run once per machine)

Two items must be configured only once:

- Google Sheets authentication
- Google Sheet URL

Both are securely stored in the system credential store.

## 1. Google Sheets authentication

### Service account (recommended)

Suitable for production servers and automated workflows.

``` r

library(smscollectr)

config_auth("path/to/service-account.json")
```

The Google Sheet must be shared with the service account email contained
in the JSON file.

After configuration, authentication is completely automatic.

No call to
[`sms_auth()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/sms_auth.md)
is required.

### OAuth (interactive)

For desktop use.

``` r

sms_auth(email = "you@gmail.com")
```

> A service account never expires and requires no browser interaction,
> making it the preferred option for operational deployments.

## 2. Store the Google Sheet URL

``` r

set_sheet_url(
  "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/SHEET_ID/edit"
)
```

The URL is stored securely in the operating system keyring.

Retrieve it anywhere using

``` r

get_sheet_url()
```

# Quick start

``` r

library(smscollectr)

result <- read_sms(
  sheet_url = get_sheet_url()
)

result$gauge
result$agro
result$bad
result$raw

readr::write_csv(
  result$gauge,
  "export_gauge.csv",
  na = ""
)

readr::write_csv(
  result$agro,
  "export_agro.csv",
  na = ""
)

clean_sheet(
  url = get_sheet_url()
)
```

# SMS formats

## Format Gauge (Rain gauge)

``` R
XXXXXXY, DD-MM-YYYY, ZZZ
```

| Field      | Description                                         | Example    |
|------------|-----------------------------------------------------|------------|
| XXXXXXY    | 6-digit station ID + type code (`P`, `S`, `A`, `C`) | 200001S    |
| DD-MM-YYYY | Observation date                                    | 03-06-2026 |
| ZZZ        | Rainfall in tenths of mm, `TR`, or `pas de pluie`   | 125        |

### Valid examples

``` R
200001S, 03-06-2026, 125
→ 12.5 mm

200002P, 04-06-2026, TR
→ trace rainfall

200003P, 04-06-2026, 0
→ no rainfall
```

### Malformed but automatically fixed

``` R
200001S, 03-06-2026, 12,5
→ fixed to 125

200001S , 03-06-2026, 12mm
→ unit removed

200001S, 03-06-2026, pas pluie
→ fixed to 0
```

## Format Agro (Agrometeorological station)

``` R
STATION-NAME
DD-MM-YYYY
Tn=305
Tx=438
TnSol=305
TxSol=525
T-10=423
T-20=406
T-50=386
Un=15
Ux=54
Vent=03
Inso=111
e=211
BAC=154
PICHE=192
RA=NT
```

| Section    | Description                    |
|------------|--------------------------------|
| Line 1     | Station name                   |
| Line 2     | Observation date               |
| Lines 3–17 | Fifteen key=value observations |

Special values

| Value        | Meaning                     |
|--------------|-----------------------------|
| `TR`         | Trace rainfall (`flag="T"`) |
| `NT`         | Not measured                |
| `xx` / `xxx` | Missing value (`flag="M"`)  |

# Output

[`read_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/read_sms.md)
returns a named list containing four objects.

## `$gauge`

| Column             | Description        |
|--------------------|--------------------|
| eg_gh_id           | Station identifier |
| year               | Year               |
| month              | Month              |
| day                | Day                |
| time               | Always `"06:00"`   |
| eg_el_abbreviation | Always `"RR"`      |
| value              | Rainfall (mm)      |
| flag               | `"T"` for trace    |

## `$agro`

One row per observed variable.

| Column             | Description          |
|--------------------|----------------------|
| eg_gh_id           | Station identifier   |
| year               | Year                 |
| month              | Month                |
| day                | Day                  |
| time               | Always `"06:00"`     |
| eg_el_abbreviation | CLIDATA element code |
| value              | Physical value       |
| flag               | `"T"`, `"M"` or `NA` |

## `$bad`

Malformed SMS messages that could not be repaired.

Original metadata are preserved for follow-up with observers.

## `$raw`

Complete raw Google Sheet restricted to messages originating from
numeric senders.

Useful for auditing and archiving.

# Security

Sensitive information is stored using the **keyring** package and never
written to plain text files.

| Secret | Function | Frequency |
|----|----|----|
| Google Sheet URL | [`set_sheet_url()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/set_sheet_url.md) / [`get_sheet_url()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/get_sheet_url.md) | Once |
| Service account | [`config_auth()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/config_auth.md) | Once |
| OAuth token | [`sms_auth()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/sms_auth.md) | Managed automatically |

# Functions

| Function | Description |
|----|----|
| [`config_auth()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/config_auth.md) | Configure service account credentials |
| [`sms_auth()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/sms_auth.md) | OAuth authentication |
| [`set_sheet_url()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/set_sheet_url.md) | Store Google Sheet URL |
| [`get_sheet_url()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/get_sheet_url.md) | Retrieve Google Sheet URL |
| [`is_gauge_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/is_gauge_sms.md) | Detect gauge SMS |
| [`is_agro_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/is_agro_sms.md) | Detect agro SMS |
| [`is_bad_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/is_bad_sms.md) | Detect malformed SMS |
| [`is_no_rain()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/is_no_rain.md) | Detect “no rainfall” messages |
| [`fix_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/fix_sms.md) | Repair malformed gauge SMS |
| [`parse_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/parse_sms.md) | Parse SMS messages |
| [`read_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/read_sms.md) | Read, repair and parse a Google Sheet |
| [`clean_sheet()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/clean_sheet.md) | Remove all data rows while preserving headers |
| [`to_station_id()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/to_station_id.md) | Convert station name to CLIDATA ID |
| [`to_element_id()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/to_element_id.md) | Convert variable name to CLIDATA element code |

# Package index

## All functions

- [`clean_sheet()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/clean_sheet.md)
  : Delete all data rows from a Google Sheet
- [`config_auth()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/config_auth.md)
  : Save service account credentials to the system keyring
- [`fix_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/fix_sms.md)
  : Attempt to fix a malformed SMS
- [`get_sheet_url()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/get_sheet_url.md)
  : Retrieve a stored Google Sheet URL from the system credential store
- [`get_sms_max_age()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/get_sms_max_age.md)
  : Get the maximum SMS age
- [`is_agro_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/is_agro_sms.md)
  : Check whether a string is a valid agrometeorological SMS
- [`is_bad_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/is_bad_sms.md)
  : Check whether an SMS is malformed
- [`is_gauge_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/is_gauge_sms.md)
  : Check whether a string is a valid rain gauge SMS
- [`is_no_rain()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/is_no_rain.md)
  : Check whether a string mentions no rainfall
- [`parse_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/parse_sms.md)
  : Parse a vector of SMS messages (all formats)
- [`read_sms()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/read_sms.md)
  : Read and parse SMS messages from a Google Sheet
- [`set_sheet_url()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/set_sheet_url.md)
  : Store a Google Sheet URL in the system credential store
- [`set_sms_max_age()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/set_sms_max_age.md)
  : Set the maximum SMS age
- [`sms_auth()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/sms_auth.md)
  : Authenticate with Google Sheets
- [`to_element_id()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/to_element_id.md)
  : Map a TCM variable name to its CLIDATA element abbreviation
- [`to_station_id()`](https://oousmane.github.io/smscollectr/reference/to_station_id.md)
  : Map a station name to its CLIDATA station code
